concept.title: Note Upgrade Instructional Video
concept.shortdesc: This topic provides an instructional video for upgrading a Note in Lyric Studio and describes the approach used to create the video, including planning, scripting, visual design, and editing.

section.title: Instructional video
section.p: This video shows how to upgrade a Note to a newer version in Lyric Studio.

Click the following link to view the instructional video:
Note upgrade instructional video

section.title: Approach to video creation and scripting
section.p: The instructional video was created using a structured approach that focused on clarity, pacing, and user understanding. The goal was to simulate a realistic product walkthrough while working within the limited set of available screenshots.

section.title: Planning the video
section.p: The process began by reviewing the provided steps for upgrading a Note and identifying the actions that needed to be shown. Since only a small number of screenshots were available, the video was planned to include:

ul.li: a short introduction to set context
step-by-step narration of the workflow
emphasis on important decision points, such as version selection
a short closing segment to reinforce the outcome

section.p: A script was created to ensure that the narration stayed aligned with the provided steps and did not introduce unsupported assumptions.

section.title: Creating the visual flow
section.p: To maintain engagement and reach the required duration, supporting visual elements were added around the product screenshots.

ul.li: Canva was used to create the introduction and closing slides
stock visuals were used to provide a smooth opening and ending
screenshots were sequenced to reflect the actual user flow

section.p: This helped create a complete viewing experience while staying aligned with the feature steps.

section.title: Recording and editing
section.p: The video was assembled and refined using editing tools that supported timing, sequencing, and transitions.

ul.li: Camtasia was used to structure the timeline, place screenshots, and manage the overall flow
Microsoft Clipchamp was used to refine playback timing and improve the final pacing
transitions and zoom effects were used to guide attention to important areas on the screen

section.title: Voiceover creation
section.p: The narration was developed to make the feature flow easy to follow.

ul.li: the voiceover script was prepared based on the provided workflow
Blaster Suite was used to generate the voiceover
pacing and emphasis were adjusted so each step could be understood clearly

section.p: This helped create a consistent voice and avoid rushed explanations.

section.title: Image refinement
section.p: The screenshots were updated where needed to improve clarity and focus.

ul.li: Snagit was used to edit screenshots
key areas were highlighted where necessary
distracting or unnecessary visual elements were reduced

section.p: This made the screenshots easier to follow during the video.

section.title: Final refinement
section.p: The final video was reviewed to make sure that:

ul.li: the narration matched the screenshots
the sequence followed the actual feature flow
the pacing felt steady and clear
the visuals were readable and easy to understand

section.p: The result is a short instructional video that combines screenshots, supporting visuals, narration, and editing to explain the Note Upgrade process in a clear and structured way.
